title: MCP Permission Model
description: Schemas for permission checks, scope negotiation, and session token management.

PermissionCheckRequest.title: Permission Check Request
PermissionCheckRequest.description: Pre-flight check: can I execute this tool with these parameters?

tool.description: Tool name to check permissions for.

parameters.description: Optional: the specific parameters intended. Some tools may have parameter-dependent permissions (e.g., read own issues vs. read all issues).

PermissionCheckResponse.title: Permission Check Response
PermissionCheckResponse.description: Server response indicating whether the operation is permitted.

missing_scopes.description: Scopes that need to be granted for this operation to succeed.

elevation_url.description: URL the user can visit to grant the missing scopes.

reason.description: Human-readable explanation of why the operation is denied.

SessionToken.title: Session Token
SessionToken.description: A scoped, time-limited session returned after authentication.

token.description: Opaque session token. Passed in subsequent requests via X-MCP-Session-Token header.

refresh_token.description: Optional token that can be used to extend the session without re-authentication.

inactivity_timeout_seconds.description: Session expires after this many seconds of inactivity, even if expires_at has not been reached.

ScopeNegotiationRequest.title: Scope Negotiation Request
ScopeNegotiationRequest.description: Client requests specific scopes during the MCP handshake.

requested_scopes.description: Scopes the client would like to have.

justification.description: Optional human-readable reason for the request, displayed to the user during consent.

ttl_seconds.description: Requested session duration. Server may grant a shorter duration.

ScopeNegotiationResponse.title: Scope Negotiation Response
ScopeNegotiationResponse.description: Server response indicating which scopes were granted.

granted_scopes.description: Scopes actually granted (may be a subset of requested).

denied_scopes.description: Scopes that were denied, with reasons.
